n: Chapter 1: The Bottom of the Well

steps.t: The bottom of the well is likely somewhere in the Water-works, in the depths of Moria, south-west of the mighty aqueduct. The dwarf Melmar may be some…
Thálfi is in the Chamber of the Cross-roads at the southern entrance to Durin's Way, north of the Great Delving. You found the bottom of the well but …
